assertions.title: Onboarding flow appears on first visit

steps.action: Clear user_onboarding table for mock wallet via Supabase REST API
steps.observed: DELETE returned empty array (no prior data)

steps.expected: Onboarding wizard displayed instead of cockpit
steps.observed: Onboarding wizard displayed with 'GETTING STARTED' header

steps.expected: Steps: Company, CEO Agent, Harness, Tour
steps.observed: Step indicators shown: '1 Company', '2 CEO Agent', '3 Harness', '4 Tour'

steps.expected: Company Name, Description, Wallet Address fields visible
steps.observed: All three fields present. Wallet Address auto-filled with mock wallet 0x1234...5678

steps.action: Fill Company Name with 'Test Agency Co'
Fill Description with 'An AI-powered agency for automated operations'

steps.observed: 0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678 displayed, labeled 'Auto-filled from your connected wallet'

steps.expected: Company created in Supabase, step advances to Step 2
steps.observed: Step advanced to Step 2 (CEO Agent). Supabase query confirmed company row created with id=191fee08-5fcb-4947-93dd-0b3357a0f144, name='Test Agency Co', wallet_address='0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678'

steps.expected: Agent Name, System Prompt, Goals, Operational Parameters visible
steps.observed: All fields present: Agent Name (defaulted to 'CEO'), System Prompt (placeholder: 'You are an autonomous CEO agent responsible for overseeing company operations...'), Goals input, Spend Limit (USDC), Budget Cap (USDC), Authority Level dropdown

steps.expected: Agent created in Supabase with role='ceo', step advances to Step 3
steps.observed: Step advanced to Step 3 (Harness). Supabase query confirmed agent created: name='CEO', role='ceo', adapter_type='claude_local' (default), status='idle'

steps.expected: 10 adapter cards with name, description, and strengths
steps.observed: 10 cards displayed: Claude (Local), Codex (Local), Cursor, Gemini (Local), OpenCode (Local), Pi (Local), OpenClaw Gateway, Process, HTTP, Hermes Agent. Each card has name, description paragraph, and strength badges (e.g., 'Deep reasoning', 'Long context', 'Code generation' for Claude)
Claude (Local) has a checkmark indicating default selection

steps.expected: Adapter type updated in Supabase, step advances to Step 4
steps.observed: Step advanced to Step 4 (Tour). Supabase query confirmed agent adapter_type updated to 'hermes'

steps.action: Complete feature tour by clicking 'Skip Tour'
steps.observed: First click on Skip Tour did not immediately redirect (button may have required re-click). Second click successfully redirected to /cockpit

steps.action: Verify cockpit loads with company data
steps.expected: Cockpit shows company name and description
steps.observed: Cockpit header shows 'Test Agency Co' and 'An AI-powered agency for automated operations'

steps.action: Verify CEO agent in sidebar agent list
steps.expected: CEO agent listed under AGENTS section

steps.action: Verify mock wallet address in header

steps.expected: CEO agent appears in org chart
steps.observed: Org chart renders with 'CEO' card showing 'Chief Executive Officer' role and 'Hermes' adapter type

frictions.description: Skip Tour button on Step 4 required two clicks to complete onboarding — first click appeared to register but did not navigate away from the tour step. Second click (using semantic text locator) succeeded.
frictions.resolution: Used 'find text Skip Tour click' semantic locator instead of ref-based click

frictions.description: WebGL/WebGPU 'Scene Error' displayed on cockpit page in headless Chromium — expected per AGENTS.md known limitations. Does not affect UI testing.
frictions.resolution: Ignored per testing guidance — cosmetic issue in headless browser

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. Full onboarding flow (company creation → CEO agent creation → harness selection → feature tour → cockpit) works end-to-end. Company and CEO agent were successfully created in Supabase with correct data. Agent appears in sidebar and org chart after onboarding completes.
